---
title: "Practice: Annotating Data On Figures"
format:
  html:
    embed-resources: true
    toc: true
---

```{r}
#| include: false
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
```

# Goal

Practice editing annotation text and placement.

# Load Data

```{r}
states <- readr::read_csv("data/real/state_population_ranks.csv")
```

# Prepare Data

```{r}
top_states <- states |>
  slice_min(rank, n = 12) |>
  mutate(
    state_name = reorder(state_name, population),
    population_millions = population / 1000000
  )
```

# Start With A Plot

```{r}
p1 <- ggplot(top_states, aes(x = state_name, y = population_millions)) +
  geom_col(fill = "gray75") +
  coord_flip(ylim = c(0, 45)) +
  labs(
    title = "Largest States By Population",
    x = NULL,
    y = "Population (millions)"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()

p1
```

# Add An Annotation

```{r}
annotation_x <- "Texas"
annotation_y <- 34
annotation_text <- "Second largest state\nin this dataset"

p1 +
  annotate(
    geom = "label",
    x = annotation_x,
    y = annotation_y,
    label = annotation_text,
    hjust = 0,
    size = 3.5,
    fill = "white",
    color = "gray20"
  )
```

# Move The Annotation

Tweak the `annotation_x` and `annotation_y` values below until the annotation is slightly better placed.

```{r}
annotation_x <- "Texas"
annotation_y <- 28
annotation_text <- "Move this label\nto a better spot"

p1 +
  annotate(
    geom = "label",
    x = annotation_x,
    y = annotation_y,
    label = annotation_text,
    hjust = 0,
    size = 3.5,
    fill = "white",
    color = "gray20"
  )
```

# Change The Annotated State

Change the `annotation_text` to match the plot.

```{r}
annotation_x <- "Florida"
annotation_y <- 26
annotation_text <- "Edit this text"

p1 +
  annotate(
    geom = "label",
    x = annotation_x,
    y = annotation_y,
    label = annotation_text,
    hjust = 0,
    size = 3.5,
    fill = "white",
    color = "gray20"
  )
```
